---
name: Change proposal
about: Propose a bug fix, documentation correction, or repo improvement.
title: ""
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What is wrong, unclear, missing, or inconsistent?

## Why It Matters

Explain the user, maintainer, or template impact.

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful change, if you already have one in mind.

## Scope And Tradeoffs

Call out affected areas, assumptions, and anything that should stay out of scope.

## Additional Context

Add links, screenshots, examples, or copy-after-edit concerns if relevant.
